description: Regression baseline queries for architecture stabilization
comparison_rules: Accept clearer wording and lower noise
Reject conclusion drift that changes the product's research intent

queries.prompt: Deep search: Compare React vs Vue for enterprise applications in 2024. Focus on community feedback, performance, and real-world pain points.
Research: Latest LLM safety and alignment research papers from 2023-2024. Need academic rigor with citations.
Due diligence analysis of Stripe as a payment processor. Look for hidden fees, regulatory issues, and customer complaints.
Deep analysis of Apple M3 MacBook Pro. Need teardown info, benchmarks, and repairability assessment.
Verify claims about a major OpenAI model announcement. Check multiple sources for contradictions and timeline consistency.
Deep search the current open-source AI agent landscape. Focus on serious frameworks, community traction, and real deployment signals.
Analyze competition among Chinese AI startups in 2026. Focus on product direction, funding signals, and market positioning.
